mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales, proxied by RSAFS, reflect accelerating consumer spending that translates into higher corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC between RSAFS growth and SPX 20d returns remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in labor market conditions, defined as UNRATE rising more than 0.4 percentage points over the prior three months, signals recession risk and generates negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive in more than 50% of triggered instances when UNRATE rises > 0.4pp in 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of falling industrial production and rising consumer prices captures stagflationary pressure that compresses profit margins and drives negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction term between INDPRO and CPIAUCSL does not significantly predict negative SPX 20d returns (t-stat > -1.5) in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: During housing-led downturns, declining housing starts predict accelerating economic contraction and negative S&P 500 returns over the next week as financial sector stress amplifies.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are not significantly negative (mean >= 0) during periods when HOUST declines > 10% YoY in a housing-led downturn.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth indicates improving supply-side efficiency and capacity utilization, which supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: INDPRO month-over-month changes fail to show positive Rank IC with SPX 20d returns over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An abrupt Federal Reserve easing cycle, identified by a cumulative 75 basis point drop in FEDFUNDS over two months, depresses the dollar and inflates risk assets, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in more than 50% of triggered instances when FEDFUNDS falls > 0.75pp in 2 months.

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of falling payroll employment and a rising unemployment rate confirms a contractionary labor market shift that precedes negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal from PAYEMS and UNRATE does not produce negative mean SPX 60d returns (t-test p > 0.05) during walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in retail sales, defined as RSAFS declining more than 2% over three months, signals collapsing consumer demand and triggers negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive in more than 55% of instances when RSAFS declines > 2% in 3 months.
